title: feat(questionnaire): interactive mockup evaluation framework for BISP website redesign

areas.summary: Created comprehensive HTML questionnaire interface with 9 mockup tabs, multi-category rating system (first impression, design, content/UX, conversion, differentiation), direct comparison matrix, component hybridization section with judge recommendations, and vision definition form. Includes JSON export functionality and responsive layout with progress tracking.
Added Word document versions documenting questionnaire structure and evaluation criteria iterations.

notable: Developed complete interactive evaluation tool enabling structured assessment of 9 school website mockups across 5 criteria categories, with dedicated sections for direct comparison, component-level hybridization with AI recommendations, and strategic vision definition.

title: refactor: minify CSS and restructure to collapsible side-panel navigation

areas.summary: Major refactoring: CSS minified (variables and rules compressed to single lines), layout restructured from fixed split-pane (topbar + iframe/form panels) to collapsible side-panel drawers (left nav, right rating), JavaScript variable names shortened (MOCKUPS→M, CRITERIA→CRIT, etc.), interaction model changed from always-visible to toggle-based drawers.

notable: Compressed questionnaire.html by ~220 net lines while transforming UI from traditional top-bar/split-pane to modern slide-out side panels (left navigation drawer + right rating panel), with full CSS minification and JavaScript restructuring maintaining all functionality.

title: feat: preview bar system for mockup browsing

areas.summary: Added CSS styles for sticky preview bar with tabbed interface, collapse/expand buttons, and iframe container. Implemented three JavaScript functions (previewBar, loadPreview, togglePreview) to manage preview switching and state. Integrated preview bar into comparison and hybridation sections with updated introductory text.

notable: Implemented interactive preview bar with tabbed mockup selector and collapsible iframe display for browsing site mockups within comparison and hybridation workflows.

title: style: ajustements de layout fullpage et positionnement

areas.summary: Révisions CSS des sections fullpage : suppression du padding (2.5rem → 0), ajustement de la position du bouton fermeture (top: 1rem → 0.35rem, z-index: 131 → 135), extension des barres de prévisualisation et cadre à 100vw avec centrage, augmentation de la hauteur de prévisualisation (45vh → 55vh, min-height: 300px → 400px).
Mise à jour du journal de synchronisation automatique avec 3 entrées.

notable: Refonte du layout fullpage : suppression des marges internes, extension au viewport complet avec centrage, augmentation de l'espace de prévisualisation.
